extensions.name: nanobanana
extensions.description: Generate and edit images using Google Gemini models. Supports flash (fast/cheap) and pro (4K) modes with multiple aspect ratios.
extensions.author: Zachary Companies

extensions.name: elevenlabs
extensions.description: Convert text to natural-sounding speech using ElevenLabs AI voices. Supports multiple voices, formats, and voice settings.
extensions.author: Zachary Companies

extensions.name: instagram
extensions.description: Post images to Instagram with captions via browser automation. Uses the Woodbury Bridge Chrome extension to control Instagram's web interface.
extensions.author: Zachary Companies

extensions.name: automat
extensions.description: Render videos from JSON project definitions using Blender's headless mode. Supports scene composition, validation, and batch rendering.
extensions.author: Zachary Companies

extensions.name: social-scheduler
extensions.description: Schedule and automate social media posting with a built-in web dashboard. Manage content calendars, queue posts, and automate publishing across platforms.
extensions.author: Zachary Companies

extensions.name: suno-create
extensions.description: Workflow-based automation for Suno music generation. Dynamically discovers workflow definitions and creates tools for each.
extensions.author: Zachary Companies
